---
name: "Branch Cleanup Report"
description: "Scan local and remote branches periodically to identify stale or unmerged work and report authors for outreach."
agent: "Branch Cleanup Report"
argument-hint: "Optional: max age in days (default 30)"
---
Scan repository branches and produce a cleanup report.

Follow branch safety rules from `AGENTS.md`. Focus on identifying stale/unmerged branches and the authors responsible.
